schemaText:
datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
}

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

enum UserRole {
  USER
  ADMIN
}

enum UserType {
  INHOUSE
  AGENCY
}

enum Provider {
  credential
  google
  kakao
  naver
}

enum WasteIndustryType {
  INTERMEDIATE_RECYCLING
  COMPREHENSIVE_RECYCLING
  FINAL_RECYCLING
  INTERMEDIATE_DISPOSAL
  FINAL_DISPOSAL
  TRANSPORT
}

enum ProfileScope {
  BUSINESS
  CATEGORY
  DOCUMENT
}

enum DocumentType {
  EMISSION_AIR_DOC
  EMISSION_WATER_DOC
  EMISSION_NOISE_DOC
  EMISSION_SMELL_DOC
  WASTE_PERMIT_DOC
  WASTE_REPORT_TRANSPORT_DOC
  WASTE_REPORT_RECYCLE_DOC
  WASTE_REPORT_DISPOSAL_DOC
  WASTE_APPROVAL_DISPOSAL_DOC
  WASTE_REPORT_EMITTER_DOC
  WASTE_STARTUP_DOC
  LOGS_AIR
  LOGS_WATER
  GAPZI
}

enum DocumentRequestStatus {
  PENDING
  IN_PROGRESS
  COMPLETED
  CANCELLED
  FAILED
}

enum ChangeType {
  NEW
  UPDATE
  EXPANSION
  CLOSE
}

enum BottomShape {
  CIRCLE
  RECT
  TRIANGLE
  TRAPEZOID
  MANUAL
}

enum MaterialType {
  RAW_MATERIAL
  FUEL
}

enum PollutantContext {
  FACILITY
  HOOD
  PRE
  POST
}

model User {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  username                String? // PostgreSQL Partial Index ىˆکëڈ™ ى„¤ى •ي•¨ (ê°’ى‌´ ى‍ˆى‌„ ë•گ Uniqueي•کëگک Nullى‌€ ى¤‘ë³µ ê°€ëٹ¥ي•کëڈ„ë،‌!)
  displayUsername         String?
  email                   String @unique
  emailVerified           Boolean @default(false)
  phoneNumber             String?
  name                    String
  role                    UserRole @default(USER)
  userType                UserType? // ى†Œى…œ ë،œê·¸ى‌¸ ى‹œ nullë،œ ê¸°ë³¸ ى €ى‍¥, credentialى—گى„œëٹ” ي•„ىˆک
  isProfileComplete       Boolean @default(false) // email, name, userTypeى‌´ ëھ¨ë‘گ ى،´ى‍¬ي•  ë•Œë§Œ isProfileCompleteë¥¼ trueë،œ ى„¤ى • (ê·¸ ى™¸ى‌ک ê²½ىڑ°ى—گëٹ” false)
  sessions                Session[]
  accounts                Account[]
  posts                   Post[]
  businesses              Business[]
  documentRequests        DocumentRequest[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("users")
}

model Session {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  userId                  String
  token                   String @unique
  ipAddress               String?
  userAgent               String?
  user                    User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  expiresAt               DateTime
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([userId, token])
  @@map("sessions")
}

model Account {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  userId                  String
  accountId               String
  providerId              Provider
  accessToken             String?
  refreshToken            String?
  accessTokenExpiresAt    DateTime?
  refreshTokenExpiresAt   DateTime?
  scope                   String?
  idToken                 String?
  password                String?
  user                    User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([userId])
  @@map("accounts")
}

model Verification {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  identifier              String
  value                   String
  expiresAt               DateTime
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([identifier])
  @@map("verifications")
}

model VerifiedEmail {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  email                   String @unique
  expiresAt               DateTime
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("verified_emails")
}

model Post {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  authorId                String
  slug                    String @unique
  title                   String
  content                 String @db
  published               Boolean @default(false)
  excerpt                 String? @db
  isFeatured              Boolean @default(false)
  author                  User @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  tags                    Tag[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("posts")
}

model Tag {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  name                    String @unique
  slug                    String @unique
  posts                   Post[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("tags")
}

model Business {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessName            String
  ownerName               String?
  ownerBirthdate          DateTime?
  businessRegNumber       String
  corporationRegNumber    String?
  businessAddress         String?
  businessPhone           String?
  mobilePhone             String?
  mainProduct             String?
  industryTypeCode        String?
  industryTypeName        String?
  wasteIndustryType       WasteIndustryType?
  userId                  String
  user                    User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  documentProfiles        BusinessDocumentProfile[]
  processFlows            ProcessFlow[]
  productionFacilities    ProductionFacility[]
  controlFacilities       ControlFacility[]
  wasteDocumentations     WasteDocumentation[]
  executiveOfficers       ExecutiveOfficer[]
  rawMaterialUsages       RawMaterialUsage[]
  landInfos               LandInfo[]
  buildingInfos           BuildingInfo[]
  temporaryBuildingInfos  TemporaryBuildingInfo[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt
  waterDocumentations     WaterDocumentation[]
  odorDocumentations      OdorDocumentation[]
  noiseDocumentations     NoiseDocumentation[]
  airDocumentations       AirDocumentation[]

  @@map("businesses")
}

model BusinessDocumentProfile {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  profileScope            ProfileScope @default(DOCUMENT)
  documentCategoryCode    String? // ى„œë¥ک ëŒ€ë¶„ë¥ک ى½”ë“œ (ىکˆ: "E01", "W01")
  documentSubCategoryCode String? // ى„œë¥ک ى¤‘ë¶„ë¥ک ى½”ë“œ (ىکˆ: "TR", "IR" ë“±)
  documentCode            String? // ى„œë¥ک ى½”ë“œ (ىکˆ: "E01-IR", "W01-TR-CP")
  submissionOffice        String? // ى œى¶œى²­
  mainProcess             String? // ê³µى •
  specificData            Json? // يٹ¹ى • ى„œë¥ک ى½”ë“œى—گ ëŒ€ي•œ ى¶”ê°€ ëچ°ى‌´ي„°
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([businessId, profileScope, documentCategoryCode, documentSubCategoryCode, documentCode]) // ي•œ ى‚¬ى—…ى‍¥ى‌€ (profileScope + documentCategoryCode + documentSubCategoryCode + documentCode) ى،°ي•©ë‹¹ ي•کë‚کى‌ک ي”„ë،œي•„ë§Œ ê°€ى§ˆ ىˆک ى‍ˆى‌Œ
  @@map("business_document_profiles")
}

model DocumentRequest {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  documentType            DocumentType
  status                  DocumentRequestStatus @default(PENDING)
  memo                    String?
  payload                 DocumentPayload?
  completedAt             DateTime?
  s3Key                   String?
  userId                  String
  user                    User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("document_requests")
}

model DocumentPayload {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  requestId               String @unique
  request                 DocumentRequest @relation(fields: [requestId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  data                    Json
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("document_payloads")
}

model ProcessFlow {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  layoutData              Json?
  productionFacilities    ProductionFacility[]
  controlFacilities       ControlFacility[]
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("process_flows")
}

model ControlFacility {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  facilityNumber          String
  facilityName            String
  size                    String?
  specification           String?
  isAirControlFacility    Boolean @default(false)
  airEmissionOutletNumber String?
  airEmissionOutletOrder  Int?
  isWaterControlFacility  Boolean @default(false)
  isSmellControlFacility  Boolean @default(false)
  isNoiseControlFacility  Boolean @default(false)
  facilityPrice           String?
  installedBuilding       String?
  manufacturer            String?
  phoneNumber             String?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  memo                    String?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  processFlows            ProcessFlow[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("control_facilities")
}

model ProductionFacility {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  facilityNumber          String
  facilityName            String
  process                 String?
  size                    String?
  specification           String?
  quantity                Int?
  isWasteFacility         Boolean @default(false)
  isAirEmissionFacility   Boolean @default(false)
  airEmissionOutletNumber String?
  isWaterEmissionFacility Boolean @default(false)
  isSmellEmissionFacility Boolean @default(false)
  isNoiseEmissionFacility Boolean @default(false)
  facilityPrice           String?
  installedBuilding       String?
  manufacturer            String?
  phoneNumber             String?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  memo                    String?
  asWasteFacility         WasteFacility?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  processFlows            ProcessFlow[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("production_facilities")
}

model WasteDocumentation {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  wasteTargetItems        WasteTargetItem[]
  wasteFacilities         WasteFacility[]
  wasteStorageFacilities  WasteStorageFacility[]
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt
  office                  Office? @relation(fields: [officeId], references: [id])
  officeId                String?
  vehicle                 Vehicle? @relation(fields: [vehicleId], references: [id])
  vehicleId               String?
  executiveOfficerId      String?

  @@map("waste_documentations")
}

model WasteTargetItem {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  wasteDocumentationId    String
  wasteCode               String?
  wasteName               String?
  preAnalysisRequired     Boolean @default(false)
  recyclingCode           String?
  recycledProduct         String?
  throughput              Float?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  wasteDocumentation      WasteDocumentation @relation(fields: [wasteDocumentationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  storedIn                WasteStorageFacility[]

  @@map("waste_target_items")
}

model WasteFacility {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  wasteDocumentationId    String
  productionFacilityId    String @unique
  capacityPerHour         Float?
  dailyOperatingHours     Float?
  dailyThroughput         Float?
  productionFacility      ProductionFacility? @relation(fields: [productionFacilityId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  wasteDocumentation      WasteDocumentation @relation(fields: [wasteDocumentationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("waste_facilities")
}

model WasteStorageFacility {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  wasteDocumentationId    String
  targetWasteId           String?
  targetWaste             WasteTargetItem?
  specificGravity         String?
  bottomShape             BottomShape?
  diameter                Float?
  width                   Float?
  length                  Float?
  topSide                 Float?
  bottomSide              Float?
  verticalSide            Float?
  height                  Float?
  Area                    String
  quantity                Int?
  volume                  Float?
  storageAmount           Float?
  storageDays             Float?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  wasteDocumentation      WasteDocumentation

  @@map("waste_storage_facilities")
}

model ExecutiveOfficer {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  name                    String?
  residentIdNumber        String?
  registrationAddress     String?
  phoneNumber             String?
  position                String?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("executive_officers")
}

model Vehicle {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  vehicleName             String?
  vehicleType             String?
  maxPayload              String?
  ownerRegistrationNumber String?
  manufacturer            String?
  modelApprovalNumber     String?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  wasteDocumentations     WasteDocumentation[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("vehicles")
}

model Office {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  officeAddress           String?
  officeArea              String?
  contactNumber           String?
  changeType              ChangeType @default(NEW)
  wasteDocumentations     WasteDocumentation[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("offices")
}

model RawMaterialUsage {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  materialType            MaterialType
  materialName            String
  dailyUsage              Float?
  monthlyOperatingDays    Int?
  monthlyUsage            Float?
  annualOperatingDays     Int?
  annualUsage             Float?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("raw_material_usages")
}

model LandInfo {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  lotNumber               String?
  landCategory            String?
  area                    Float?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("land_infos")
}

model BuildingInfo {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  dong                    String?
  floors                  Int?
  purpose                 String?
  area                    Float?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("building_infos")
}

model TemporaryBuildingInfo {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  reportNumber            String?
  dong                    String?
  floors                  Int?
  purpose                 String?
  structure               String?
  area                    Float?
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("temporary_building_infos")
}

model WaterDocumentation {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("water_documentations")
}

model OdorDocumentation {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("odor_documentations")
}

model NoiseDocumentation {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("noise_documentations")
}

model AirDocumentation {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  businessId              String
  business                Business @relation(fields: [businessId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  airEmissionFacilities   AirEmissionFacility[]
  airControlFacilities    AirControlFacility[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("air_documentations")
}

model AirEmissionFacility {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  airDocumentationId      String
  productionFacilityId    String?
  facilityNumber          String?
  power                   String?
  size                    String?
  category                String?
  rawMaterial             String?
  rawMaterialUsage        Float?
  fuel                    String?
  fuelUsage               Float?
  dailyOperatingHours     Float?
  annualOperatingDays     Int?
  airDocumentation        AirDocumentation @relation(fields: [airDocumentationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  productionFacility      ProductionFacility? @relation(fields: [productionFacilityId], references: [id])
  hoods                   Hood[]
  pollutants              Pollutant[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("air_emission_facilities")
}

model Hood {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  airEmissionFacilityId   String
  airControlFacilityId    String?
  emissionOutletNumber    String?
  airEmissionFacility     AirEmissionFacility @relation(fields: [airEmissionFacilityId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  airControlFacility      AirControlFacility? @relation(fields: [airControlFacilityId], references: [id])
  pollutants              Pollutant[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("hoods")
}

model AirControlFacility {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  airDocumentationId      String
  controlFacilityId       String?
  airDocumentation        AirDocumentation @relation(fields: [airDocumentationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  controlFacility         ControlFacility? @relation(fields: [controlFacilityId], references: [id])
  hoods                   Hood[]
  pollutants              Pollutant[]
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("air_control_facilities")
}

model Pollutant {
  id                      String @id @default(cuid())
  name                    String
  concentration           Float?
  unit                    String?
  context                 PollutantContext
  airEmissionFacilityId   String?
  hoodId                  String?
  airControlFacilityId    String?
  airEmissionFacility     AirEmissionFacility? @relation(fields: [airEmissionFacilityId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  hood                    Hood? @relation(fields: [hoodId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  airControlFacility      AirControlFacility? @relation(fields: [airControlFacilityId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("pollutants")
}

todoItems.title: ëŒ€ê¸°ى„œë¥ک - AirEmissionFacility ê³ ىœ  ي•„ë“œ ي™•ى •
todoItems.body:
ë°°ى¶œى‹œى„¤ ى „ىڑ© ي•„ë“œ ى¤‘ ëڈ™ë ¥, êµ¬ë¶„ ë“± ى„¸ë¶€ ë‹¨ىœ„/يƒ€ى‍… ي™•ى • ي•„ىڑ”
يک„ى‍¬: power, size, category, rawMaterial, rawMaterialUsage, fuel, fuelUsage, dailyOperatingHours, annualOperatingDays
â†’ ê°پ ي•„ë“œ يƒ€ى‍…(String/Float/Int) ë°ڈ ë‹¨ىœ„ ي™•ى • ي›„ ë°کىکپ

todoItems.title: ëŒ€ê¸°ى„œë¥ک - AirControlFacility ê³ ىœ  ي•„ë“œ ى¶”ê°€
todoItems.body:
ë°©ى§€ى‹œى„¤ ëŒ€ê¸° ى „ىڑ© ى¶”ê°€ ي•„ë“œ ë¯¸ي™•ى •
ControlFacility ê¸°ë³¸ ي•„ë“œ ى™¸ ëŒ€ê¸°ى„œë¥کى—گى„œë§Œ ي•„ىڑ”ي•œ ي•­ëھ© ي™•ى‌¸ ي›„ ى¶”ê°€
â†’ ى²کë¦¬ ë°©ى‹‌, ىڑ©ëں‰, يڑ¨ىœ¨ ë“± ê²€ي†  ي•„ىڑ”

todoItems.title: يڈگىˆکى„œë¥ک - WaterDocumentation ي•کىœ„ êµ¬ى،° ى„¤ê³„
todoItems.body:
يک„ى‍¬ WaterDocumentationى‌€ ê¸°ë³¸ êµ¬ى،°ë§Œ ى،´ى‍¬
ëŒ€ê¸°ى„œë¥ک يŒ¨ي„´ ى°¸ê³ ي•کى—¬ ى„¤ê³„:
- WaterEmissionFacility (ë°°ى¶œى‹œى„¤ â†’ ProductionFacility ى°¸ى،°)
- WaterControlFacility (ë°©ى§€ى‹œى„¤ â†’ ControlFacility ى°¸ى،°)
- ىک¤ى—¼ë¬¼ى§ˆى‌€ ê³µي†µ Pollutant ëھ¨ëچ¸ ى‍¬ى‚¬ىڑ© (FK ى¶”ê°€ ي•„ىڑ”)

todoItems.title: ى•…ى·¨ى„œë¥ک - OdorDocumentation ي•کىœ„ êµ¬ى،° ى„¤ê³„
todoItems.body:
يک„ى‍¬ OdorDocumentationى‌€ ê¸°ë³¸ êµ¬ى،°ë§Œ ى،´ى‍¬
ى•…ى·¨ يٹ¹ىœ  ي•­ëھ©(ë³µي•©ى•…ى·¨, ى§€ى •ى•…ى·¨ë¬¼ى§ˆ) ي™•ى‌¸ ي•„ىڑ”
ëŒ€ê¸°ى„œë¥ک يŒ¨ي„´ ى°¸ê³ ي•کى—¬ êµ¬ى„±

todoItems.title: ى†Œى‌Œى§„ëڈ™ى„œë¥ک - NoiseDocumentation ي•کىœ„ êµ¬ى،° ى„¤ê³„
todoItems.body:
يک„ى‍¬ NoiseDocumentationى‌€ ê¸°ë³¸ êµ¬ى،°ë§Œ ى،´ى‍¬
ى†Œى‌Œ/ى§„ëڈ™ ى¸،ى • ë‹¨ىœ„ ë°ڈ ي•­ëھ© يٹ¹ى„± ي™•ى‌¸ ي›„ ى„¤ê³„

todoItems.title: Pollutant - يڈگىˆک/ى•…ى·¨ ى„œë¥ک FK ى¶”ê°€
todoItems.body:
يک„ى‍¬ Pollutantëٹ” ëŒ€ê¸°ى„œë¥ک FKë§Œ ى‍ˆى‌Œ
- airEmissionFacilityId, hoodId, airControlFacilityId
يڈگىˆک/ى•…ى·¨ ى„œë¥ک ى„¤ê³„ ى™„ë£Œ ي›„ ي•´ë‹¹ FK ى¶”ê°€

todoItems.title: ى‚¬ى—…ى‍¥ ê¸°ë³¸ى •ë³´ - ë‚کë¨¸ى§€ ي•کىœ„ ëھ¨ëچ¸ ي•„ë“œ ê²€ي†
todoItems.body:
Vehicle: vehicleRegistrationNumber ي•„ë“œ ëˆ„ë‌½ ي™•ى‌¸
ExecutiveOfficer: ى‍„ى›گ ى •ë³´ ي•„ë“œ ى™„ى„±ëڈ„ ê²€ي† 
Office: يک„ى‍¬ officeAddress, officeArea, contactNumber - ى¶”ê°€ ي•„ë“œ ى—†ëٹ”ى§€ ي™•ى‌¸

suggestItems.author: Moody
suggestItems.title: [ى„¤ê³„ ى›گى¹™] ى‚¬ى—…ى‍¥(Business) ê²©ë¦¬
suggestItems.body:
ëھ¨ë“  ëچ°ى‌´ي„°ëٹ” Businessë¥¼ ë£¨يٹ¸ë،œ ى§پى ‘ ëکگëٹ” ê°„ى ‘ ى—°ê²°
- ى§پى ‘ ى†Œىœ : ProcessFlow, ProductionFacility, ControlFacility, *Documentation ë“±
- ê°„ى ‘ ى†Œىœ : ى—­ىˆœىœ¼ë،œ يƒ€ê³  ىک¬ë‌¼ê°€ë©´ Businessى—گ ëڈ„ë‹¬ ê°€ëٹ¥ي•کë©´ OK
- ى§پى ‘ FKê°€ ى¤‘ë³µëگکë©´ ى œê±° (WasteFacility.businessId ى œê±° ى‚¬ë،€)
â†’ WasteFacility â†’ WasteDocumentation â†’ Business ë،œ ى¶©ë¶„

suggestItems.author: Moody
